articles.title_en: European Forces Intercept ‘Shadow Fleet’ Oil Tanker in Mediterranean Sea
articles.lead_en: A European naval mission boarded a Russia-linked oil tanker suspected of sailing under a false flag on Monday, the EU’s top diplomat Kaja Kallas said.
